summary: Iteration 98 - Testing Data Management page and Scheduled PDF Reports feature. All backend APIs (15/15) and frontend UI tests passed. Data Management shows stats for 7 collections (sales, expenses, supplier_payments, invoices, activity_logs, scheduler_logs, notifications). Scheduled Reports page allows creating, editing, and triggering PDF report email delivery.
critical_code_review_comments: Data Management page correctly displays all 7 archivable collections with total records, date ranges, and archivable counts
Archive, Export, Restore, and Purge buttons work correctly with proper API integration
Scheduled Reports page properly integrates with APScheduler for cron-based PDF report delivery
Send Now button triggers PDF generation and email delivery (email may fail due to SMTP block but endpoint works)
Data Management link correctly added to sidebar under ADMIN section with Database icon

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and navigation verified

seed_data_creation: Created test scheduled reports for sales and expenses during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 98 verified: 1) Data Management page at /data-management works with all 7 collections (sales=52, expenses=51, supplier_payments=1, invoices=10, activity_logs=532, scheduler_logs=18, notifications=89), 2) Archive button with month threshold selector (3/6/12 months), 3) Export button downloads JSON data, 4) Archive history shows restored/purged status, 5) Scheduled Reports at /scheduled-reports allows daily/weekly/monthly PDF report scheduling, 6) Send Now button triggers immediate PDF email delivery (SMTP blocked by Microsoft 365 but endpoint works), 7) Sidebar has Data Management link under ADMIN section

collections.expenses: 51 total records, 1 record older than 12 months (archivable)

api_endpoints.GET /api/data-management/stats: WORKING - Returns collection stats and archive history

sidebar_navigation.data_management_link: WORKING - Under ADMIN section with Database icon
sidebar_navigation.scheduled_reports_link: WORKING - Under ADMIN section with CalendarClock icon

known_limitations: Email delivery via SMTP is blocked by Microsoft 365 (authentication error). PDF reports can be generated but email sending may fail. This is an external service limitation, not a code issue.
